summary: Iteration 38 - OTP Login 2-Step Flow Bug Fix Verified. Fixed issue where OTP input field was not showing after clicking 'Send OTP'. The MSG91 widget's sendOtp() was returning undefined (not an error), causing the code to incorrectly show an error message instead of transitioning to Step 2. Fixed by updating the response handling logic in AdminLogin.js and StaffLogin.js to treat undefined/null responses as successful OTP send (widget opened).
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX: AdminLogin.js - MSG91 sendOtp() returns undefined when widget opens. Previous code treated this as error. Fixed by checking for explicit error response (response.type === 'error') instead of success (response.type === 'success').
BUG FIX: StaffLogin.js - Same fix applied for consistency with AdminLogin.js.
context_for_next_testing_agent: OTP 2-step flow is now working correctly. After clicking 'Send OTP', the OTP input field and 'Verify & Login' button now appear as expected. The fix handles MSG91 widget's sendOtp() returning undefined by treating it as successful OTP send.

bug_fix_applied.issue: After clicking 'Send OTP', user saw error 'Failed to send OTP. Please try again.' instead of OTP input field
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: MSG91 widget's sendOtp() function returns undefined when it opens successfully (not a response object with type='success'). Code was checking for response.type === 'success' which failed for undefined.
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed logic to only show error when response.type === 'error'. Otherwise, proceed to Step 2 (show OTP input).
files_modified: AdminLogin.js - lines 59-73 (first sendOtp check) and lines 92-106 (setTimeout sendOtp check)
StaffLogin.js - lines 57-71 (first sendOtp check) and lines 86-100 (setTimeout sendOtp check)

admin_login_password.notes: Successfully logged in with admin@asr123 and redirected to /admin/dashboard

admin_login_otp_step2.notes: After clicking Send OTP: OTP input field, 'Verify & Login' button, 'Change Number' link, 'Resend in 30s' all visible.

staff_login_otp_step1.notes: Mobile input and 'Send OTP' button visible. OTP input hidden.

staff_login_otp_step2.notes: After clicking Send OTP: OTP input field, 'Verify & Login' button, 'Change Number' link, 'Resend in 30s' all visible.
